questions: What are Spotify ad performance benchmarks useful for?
How should advertisers use audio/podcast benchmarks?
qa.answer: Spotify publishes conversion and engagement benchmarks for audio and podcast ads to help advertisers gauge performance and set expectations by objective and format.
implication: Use benchmarks to forecast and sanity‑check; optimize creative scripts and CTAs.
Leverage audience targeting and frequency controls to improve conversion.
Pair with brand and lift studies to capture full‑funnel impact.
